differential_diagnoses: Head and neck malignancy (e.g., squamous cell carcinoma)
Deep neck space abscess with vascular erosion
next_steps: Urgent CT angiography (CTA) of the neck to rule out vascular pseudoaneurysm or aberrant carotid artery
Immediate cessation of all invasive procedures (aspiration, incision, biopsy) until vascular imaging is complete
Otolaryngology-Head and Neck Surgery consultation for expert evaluation and surgical planning
Preparation for potential emergent endovascular intervention or surgical control of hemorrhage
Tissue biopsy for histopathology only after vascular pathology is excluded
